text:
War for Paradis arc is the eleventh and final story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

The Scout Regiment has returned to Paradis Island after the attack led by Eren Jaeger on Liberio, but they soon find themselves at trouble in their own land when a faction of soldiers goes rogue and attempts to seize control of the territory, intending to found a new Eldian Empire with Eren as their leader. Meanwhile, Marley prepares to launch a devastating counter-strike on the island. With enemies inside and outside, a multi-front conflict begins to decide the fate of Paradis.
